name: void-toast-overlay
description: Standalone Steam-like toast notification binary for launchers

scripts.dev:x11: WAYLAND_DISPLAY='' GDK_BACKEND=x11 RUST_BACKTRACE=1 npx tauri dev -- --title="Teste X11" --message="Notificação via XWayland" --game="VoidLauncher" --icon=🏆 --duration=5000
scripts.build:all: npm run build:linux && npm run build:windows
